productDisplayName: Nike Men's Team Poly Red T-shirt
description: CompositionRound neck grey and black t-shirt made of 100% dry Fit polyester fabric, with white patches on the sides and brand swoosh on right chestFittingComfortWash careHand wash or machine washIf you are a fitness freak, then this round neck t-shirt from nike is a must-have in your wardrobe. If you are not working out in this tee, then team it with a pair of jeans and sneakers for that casual look.
